titleStmt.title: SII 24.339: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 339. (A.R. No. 59 of 1892.) II PRĀKĀRA, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Records the order of Śāḷuva Tirumalaidēva Mahārāja, son of Śāḷuva Gōpa that the produce from all the lands exclusive of tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam lands, in excess of the taxes assessed, may be allowed to accumualate in the treasury of the temple. The details of the date viz. Śaka 1385, Subhānu, Makara, ba. 15, Sunday, Uttirāḍam, correspond to A.D. 1464, January 12, Sunday, f.d.t. ·01, ·86.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. IV, No. 506.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śakābdam 1385ṉmel cellāniṉṟa subhānusamvat sarattu makaranāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu Amāvāsyaiyum Ādityavāramum peṟṟa Uttirāṭattu nāḷ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍalēśvaran mēdinimīsarakaṇḍa kaṭṭārisāḷuva dharaṇivarāhaḥ tribhuvanarāyar kaṇḍarakūḷi pakaitta vaṉṉiyar kulaikāla rājapakṣi ( sāḷuva) sāḷuvat tirumalaidēvamahārājar perumāḷ śrīraṅgarājaṟku tiruccirāppaḷḷi Ucāvaṭi miḻaiṉāṭu melaimuṟi kiḻaimuṟi Āmūrnāṭu Alakaṟai nāṭu teṉkarai rājagambhīravaḷaṉāṭu Atiyamaṅkalappaṟṟu viḻāvaṟā vitivaḷanāṭu valālaṉāṭu tañcāūṟcirmai maṇaṟpiṭināṭu nittaviṉota vaḷaṉāṭu śrī parāntakanāṭu viṭṭapaṟṟu veṇpāṉāṭu
koṉāṭu tiruvārūr Ucāvaṭi Ālaṅkuṭippaṟṟu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻavaḷaṉāṭu tiruṉaṟai Ūṟpaṟṟut tiruccirāppaḷḷi Ucāvaṭi Iṭaiyāṟṟuṉāṭu maṟṟum Uṇṭāṉa pala cirmaikaḷil perumāḷ śrīraṅgarājar tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam Āka naṭakkiṟa Ūrkaḷukku Iṟai Ilāpam Ākap patintuvarukiṟa Ilakkam Uḷḷitum kaḻittu ṉammuṭaiya vācalil maṉi(t)tarum maṟṟum palarum kuttokai koṇṭu niṟkiṟa Ūrkaḷum tiṟantu koyil paṇṭārattile sañcātamāka kaṇṭukoḷḷumpaṭiyum kaṟpittu Im mariyātikku perumāḷ śrīraṅgarājar sannadhiile dhārāpūrvvamākak kuṭutta Aḷavukku Anta Ilakkam Uḷḷatu perumāḷ śrīpaṇṭārattile Aḻaippittuk koḷḷavum . Inta dharmmattukku Ahitam paṇṇiṉār Uṇṭākil gaṅkai
karaiyile kapilaiyaik koṉṟavaṉuṭaiya pāpattile pokak kaṭavarkaḷākavum gha . grāmā ssanti mahōdayāḥ kṣititalē yē raṅgarājasya tān sarvvānnityamannyagāmi vibhavān kṛtvā svayam bhaktimān . bhūyō bhūṣaṇajālakam bahutarantasyaiva yōdattavān sōyam sāḷuvagōpatimmanṛpati rbhūyā cciram jīvitā . 1 śrīmadraṅgadhurandharasya mahitam mañcam prabhōdaciētam yōdivyānyapi bhūṣa ṇāni maṇibhirddīprāṇi bhaktyādiśat . grāmānasya ca yō karōt praśamitā nyākrāntikān susthirān jīyāt sāḷuvatimmabhūpatirasau nityannidhi ḥ śrēyasām . 2 Ētannirupamandharmmam yaḥ kvacillaṅghayēdyadi . gaṅgāyāmēṣa kapilām hantuḥ pāpamavāpsyatē . 3
raṅgēśōyamadharmmaghōrajaladhau dharmmannilīnam samuddhartum svīkratavigraha sya jagati svīyāmśabhūtasya tē . smērāsyam khalu gōpatimmanṛpatē kīrttim jagatpāva nīm dhattē vakṣasi tārahāra nikaravyājēna māśaṅkayā . §
Digital edition of SII 24.339 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
